case_title: LUIZ R F GALLETTI VS. PABLO SEVERINO GANGOSO DYSUANGCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2023 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF LUIZ R F GALLETTI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PABLO SEVERINO GANGOSO DYSUANGCO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DELUXE SIGHTSEEING, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SANTOKH SOHAL (OWNER). BOTH DEFENDANTS PABLO SEVERINO GANGOSO DYSUANGCO AND DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DELUXE SIGHTSEEING, LLC WAIVE ANY SERVICE ISSUES TO MOVE FORWARD TO TRIAL. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF CURRENT ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DELUXE SIGHTSEEING LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SANTOKH SOHAL, OWNER. FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DELUXE SIGHTSEEING LLC
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE DEC-27-22.SC-100 MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:UNCLAIMED UNABLE TO FORWARD RETURN TO SENDER)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE MAR-30-2023 SC-100 MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALLETTI, LUIZ R F AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DELUXE SIGHTSEEING LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-16-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LUIZ R F GALLETTI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PABLO SEVERINO GANGOSO DYSUANGCO IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DELUXE SIGHTSEEING LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED ON SAN FRANCISCO DELUXE SIGHTSEEING, DEFENDANT ARRIVED TO COURT AFTER HEARING WITH COMPLAINT IN HAND. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-07-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LUIZ R F GALLETTI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PABLO SEVERINO GANGOSO DYSUANGCO IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE BY COURT'S CERTIFIED MAIL HAS RETURNED AS "UNABLE TO FORWARD". NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALLETTI, LUIZ R F AS TO DEFENDANT DYSUANGCO, PABLO SEVERINO GANGOSO
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY GALLETTI, LUIZ R F DYSUANGCO, PABLO SEVERINO GANGOSO SAN FRANCISCO DELUXE SIGHTSEEING LLC

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALLETTI, LUIZ R F RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DELUXE SIGHTSEEING LLC $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,095.00, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION (MC-025). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GALLETTI, LUIZ R F AS TO DEFENDANT DYSUANGCO, PABLO SEVERINO GANGOSO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALLETTI, LUIZ R F AS TO DEFENDANT DYSUANGCO, PABLO SEVERINO GANGOSO
AMENDED DECLARATION REGARDING ADDING DEFENDANT TO ORIGNAL CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALLETTI, LUIZ R F
TRIAL RESET TO APR-13-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-07-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SIGNATURE FOUND. SERVED FEB-17-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DYSUANGCO, PABLO SEVERINO GANGOSO
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2023 - JUDGMENT.
